category_sources: source_facts.description says it is William's miscellaneous git tools; official GitHub About text says Miscellaneous Git Tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is willgit; official GitHub repository name is willgit.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository is the best available documentation surface found; it exposes the tool scripts and project metadata but has no dedicated README/manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/DanielVartanov/willgit, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list multiple git-* commands; official GitHub language metadata identifies Ruby as the main implementation language.
